projects.name: Quiver
projects.phase: Devkit phase — first devkit FLEW Jul 9 (Houston)
projects.milestone: Next test flight w/ new M9N GPS (installed Jul 13) when Turkey side has bandwidth
projects.blocker: Attachment-interface supplier link dead (replacement sourcing open) · old GPS failed in flight (component popped off board)

projects.name: Spearhead
projects.phase: PT1 build — large structural parts cut, fuselage skins printing
projects.milestone: Wood+CF airframe assembly + transition prints, then full-system bench test
projects.blocker: Motors/ESCs/props still in customs ("likely a few days", unconfirmed) · PDB thick-cable output connection method undecided · pusher-motor stability question unresolved

projects.name: Caribou
projects.phase: Phase 1 — final stretch; CBC boards up, firmware bench-validated on real FC
projects.milestone: Both CBCs allocated via DNA + battery telemetry bridged to Mission Planner (Jul 21) → hover testing this week

projects.name: Longshot
projects.milestone: Drop-in spot-welded battery replacement nearing finish (no ETA while Caribou occupies Julius)

projects.name: Arrow Spreader (Javelina)
projects.phase: v1 hacked JMRRC flying grids; v3 = full open-source Arrow spreader (decided Jul 10)
projects.milestone: v3 program design doc (Vector) → issue #233; DroneCAN node + COTS ESC electronics-first
projects.blocker: JMRRC internal PCB corrupts PWM — bypassed; spinner ESC overheats (relocate/replace)

projects.name: Quiver Mini / Kestrel
projects.phase: Parked — Kestrel is the near-term small platform
projects.milestone: Upload Kestrel as reference build · Zeynep's micro-swarm proposal echoes the Mini idea

actions.item: Spreader v3 program design doc → issue #233
Bypass JMRRC PCB entirely + fly spreader grids
Web store → on-chain pivot (smart-contract commission flow)
Board election Snapshot proposal (after nominations close)
Caribou hover testing (CBC firmware validated Jul 21)
PT1 airframe assembly while transition parts print

governance.item: AIP-010 — Tokenomics: PASSED Jul 21 (4.62M For / 0 Against) — marked Final in dao-aips
First $ARROW Treasury Sale — Tranche 1: LIVE on Snapshot, closes ~Jul 22
Board election — nominations close Jul 22 23:59 UTC; 5 candidates declared; Snapshot vote ~Jul 23–30
Sleety's Media/Docs/Compass proposals ($61,320 max / 28wk) — PASSED Jul 13
